title: CategoriesFile
description: The human-authored category value pools = the DIMENSION SOURCE at datasets/categories.json. Build-time authoring input consumed by the generator. Mirrors tools/corpus.py CategoriesFile. An optional glyphPack makes a category glyph-backed (each value id must be a slug in that pack); absent glyphPack = text-only.

evolution.change: Initial CategoriesFile v1: schemaVersion, categories{ <id> -> CategoryPool{label,kind(nominal|ordinal|numeric),values[CategoryValue{id,label,magnitude?}],glyphPack?,unit?,note?} }, note?.
evolution.why: Story-first pivot needs an original, versioned dimension source the generator date-seeds a pick from; typed before logic (CLAUDE.md sec 11).
